name: Ioun Stone: Reserve
description: This vibrant purple prism stores spells cast into it, holding them until you use them. The stone can store up to 4 levels of spells at a time. When found, it contains 1d4 levels of stored spells chosen by the DM.

casting_into_stone.activation: Touch stone as spell is cast
casting_into_stone.effect: Spell stored in stone with no other effect

casting_from_stone.effect: Cast any stored spell using original caster's slot level, save DC, attack bonus, and ability
casting_from_stone.removal: Spell no longer stored after casting, freeing up space
